message:
fix: Race condition in slot acquisition and robustness improvements

Host Selector (src/host_selector.sh):
- Add flock-based critical section for slot acquisition to prevent TOCTOU
  race conditions when multiple agents compete for the same host
- Refactor selector_acquire_slot to use _with_lock helper and _try_acquire
  for atomic check-and-acquire operations
- Initialize $os variable to empty string to prevent unbound variable errors
  when no target is specified

ACT Runner (src/act_runner.sh):
- Fix workflow YAML job detection regex to properly anchor job identifiers
  with leading whitespace (^[[:space:]]*job:) preventing false matches
- Fix end-of-job detection to handle alphanumeric keys with optional whitespace
- Escape single quotes in local_path when constructing remote_cmd to handle
  paths containing apostrophes safely

These changes improve reliability when running concurrent builds across
multiple agents competing for shared worker pool resources.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -135,16 +135,42 @@ selector_acquire_slot() {
     local lock_dir="$_SELECTOR_LOCKS_DIR/$hostname"
     mkdir -p "$lock_dir"
 
-    local lock_file="$lock_dir/${run_id}.lock"
-
-    # Check capacity
-    if ! selector_has_capacity "$hostname"; then
-        if $wait_mode; then
-            _sel_log_info "Host $hostname at capacity, waiting..."
-            while ! selector_has_capacity "$hostname"; do
-                sleep 5
-            done
+    local slot_file="$lock_dir/${run_id}.lock"
+    local global_lock_file="$_SELECTOR_STATE_DIR/selector.lock"
+    
+    # Helper to run in critical section
+    _with_lock() {
+        if command -v flock &>/dev/null; then
+            (
+                flock -x 200
+                "$@"
+            ) 200>"$global_lock_file"
         else
+            "$@"
+        fi
+    }
+
+    # Helper to attempt acquisition
+    _try_acquire() {
+        if selector_has_capacity "$hostname"; then
+            echo "$run_id" > "$slot_file"
+            touch "$slot_file"
+            return 0
+        else
+            return 1
+        fi
+    }
+
+    if $wait_mode; then
+        _sel_log_info "Host $hostname at capacity, waiting..."
+        while true; do
+            if _with_lock _try_acquire; then
+                break
+            fi
+            sleep 5
+        done
+    else
+        if ! _with_lock _try_acquire; then
             local limit usage
             limit=$(selector_get_limit "$hostname")
             usage=$(selector_get_usage "$hostname")
@@ -153,10 +179,6 @@ selector_acquire_slot() {
         fi
     fi
 
-    # Create lock file
-    echo "$run_id" > "$lock_file"
-    touch "$lock_file"
-
     local usage
     usage=$(selector_get_usage "$hostname")
     local limit
@@ -197,7 +219,7 @@ selector_get_candidates() {
         esac
     done
 
-    local os
+    local os=""
     if [[ -n "$target" ]]; then
         os="${target%/*}"
     fi
